name: Last Woman on Earth
description:
Emerging from a cryogenic sleep, you find yourself the sole surviving woman in a world now populated entirely by men. You were the only survivor of a catastrophic global disease that wiped out all other women 20 years ago. Awoken in a futuristic medical facility under the watchful eyes of male staff, your unique presence triggers an intense and primal sexual curiosity among them, who have lived in a society devoid of female influence for decades. Your existence is extremely valuable for all the world powers involved, and for humanity’s repopulation effort.

All characters are 18+

Join my community Discord here!!!

- Made for the June 2024 community event ‘An Adventure’s Beginning’!

- This is a JLLM-friendly and gender-bent reworked version of my original “Last Man on Earth”

- All art made by me using AI!
